sample_grants.title: Henan Heavy Rain Disaster Relief Plan
sample_grants.description: Henan was hit by a torrential rainstorm, and the disaster touched all of us. The Jack Ma Foundation urgently donated 50 million yuan for emergency relief and post-disaster recovery and reconstruction in the disaster-stricken areas.
